hooks.command: (command -v afplay >/dev/null && afplay "$HOME/.claude/sounds/permission_request.mp3") || (command -v mpg123 >/dev/null && mpg123 -q "$HOME/.claude/sounds/permission_request.mp3") || (command -v ffplay >/dev/null && ffplay -nodisp -autoexit -loglevel quiet "$HOME/.claude/sounds/permission_request.mp3") || (command -v paplay >/dev/null && paplay "$HOME/.claude/sounds/permission_request.mp3") || powershell -c "(New-Object Media.SoundPlayer '$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR\.claude\sounds\permission_request.mp3').PlaySync()" 2>/dev/null

(command -v afplay >/dev/null && afplay "$HOME/.claude/sounds/stop.mp3") || (command -v mpg123 >/dev/null && mpg123 -q "$HOME/.claude/sounds/stop.mp3") || (command -v ffplay >/dev/null && ffplay -nodisp -autoexit -loglevel quiet "$HOME/.claude/sounds/stop.mp3") || (command -v paplay >/dev/null && paplay "$HOME/.claude/sounds/stop.mp3") || powershell -c "(New-Object Media.SoundPlayer '$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR\.claude\sounds\stop.mp3').PlaySync()" 2>/dev/null

(command -v afplay >/dev/null && afplay "$HOME/.claude/sounds/pre_compact.mp3") || (command -v mpg123 >/dev/null && mpg123 -q "$HOME/.claude/sounds/pre_compact.mp3") || (command -v ffplay >/dev/null && ffplay -nodisp -autoexit -loglevel quiet "$HOME/.claude/sounds/pre_compact.mp3") || (command -v paplay >/dev/null && paplay "$HOME/.claude/sounds/pre_compact.mp3") || powershell -c "(New-Object Media.SoundPlayer '$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR\.claude\sounds\pre_compact.mp3').PlaySync()" 2>/dev/null
